app.title: vesta
experimental.disclaimer: These features are under evaluation: they may change, move, or be removed. Feedback is welcome.
experimental.condense.title: Condensed Audio
experimental.condense.subtitle: Extracts only the spoken segments from the media and concatenates them into a single MP3 — listen to an episode again without silences or music.
experimental.condense.subtitlesHint: Uses the SRT timestamps: fast and precise when the subtitles are in sync.
experimental.condense.vadHint: Detects speech with Silero VAD: no subtitles needed. Requires the VAD model (Settings → Whisper).
experimental.anki.title: AnkiConnect
experimental.anki.subtitle: Talks to a running Anki instance via the AnkiConnect add-on (code 2055492159): import your generated APKG decks without leaving Vesta.
experimental.anki.decksFound: {{count}} decks found in the open profile
experimental.anki.importHint: Anki must be open with AnkiConnect installed. The deck is imported into the currently open profile.
settings.refinementPromptDesc: This prompt is used when automatically adding notes to flashcards using AI.
settings.llmConfigIncompleteDescLocalOff: The local LLM server is offline. Please start Ollama/LM Studio or verify the endpoint URL.
